TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Willie Adams hya'ga qutux sa sinsyuw sinmung ptkura' mari' na Amirika' quw cyux niya' pcyuwagun. kinwagiq niya' ga 180 senci', kinz'usuw niya' ga 73 kiru gramu. kki'an niya' tkura' mari' ga pklahang sa kska' balay hiya'. ryax pincyuwagan niya' ga yasa knaki' niya' sa National Basketball League NBA krayryax. ryax 'nwah niya' mspung mari' ga aring kawas 1973 ruw mucing kawas 1983. Pllpgun 'nagal niya' tins' kwara' ga 3.6 tins' niya'. Willie Adams sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: willie a*ams~ɕ ħjaʔɣa qutux s~ɕa s~ɕins~ɕjuw s~ɕinmuŋ ptkuraʔ mariʔ na amirikaʔ quw ʦ~ʨjux nijaʔ pʦ~ʨjuwaɣun. kinwaɣiq nijaʔ ɣa *** s~ɕenʦ~ʨiʔ, kinzʔus~ɕuw nijaʔ ɣa ** kiru ɣramu. kkiʔan nijaʔ tkuraʔ mariʔ ɣa pklaħaŋ s~ɕa ks~ɕkaʔ βalaj ħijaʔ. rjax pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan nijaʔ ɣa jas~ɕa knakiʔ nijaʔ s~ɕa national βas~ɕketβall leaɣue nβa krajrjax. rjax ʔnwaħ nijaʔ ms~ɕpuŋ mariʔ ɣa ariŋ kawas~ɕ **** ruw muʦ~ʨiŋ kawas~ɕ ****. pllpɣun ʔnaɣal nijaʔ tins~ɕʔ kwaraʔ ɣa *.* tins~ɕʔ nijaʔ. willie a*ams~ɕ s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
S.FORM: Willie Adams hya'ga qutux sa sinsyuw sinmung ptkura' mari' na Amirika' quw cyux niya' pcyuwagun. kinwagiq niya' ga 180 senci', kinz'usuw niya' ga 73 kiru gramu. kki'an niya' tkura' mari' ga pklahang sa kska' balay hiya'. ryax pincyuwagan niya' ga yasa knaki' niya' sa National Basketball League NBA krayryax. ryax 'nwah niya' mspung mari' ga aring kawas 1973 ruw mucing kawas 1983. Pllpgun 'nagal niya' tins' kwara' ga 3.6 tins' niya'. Willie Adams sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: willie a*ams~ɕ ħjaʔɣa qutux s~ɕa s~ɕins~ɕjuw s~ɕinmuŋ ptkuraʔ mariʔ na amirikaʔ quw ʦ~ʨjux nijaʔ pʦ~ʨjuwaɣun. kinwaɣiq nijaʔ ɣa *** s~ɕenʦ~ʨiʔ, kinzʔus~ɕuw nijaʔ ɣa ** kiru ɣramu. kkiʔan nijaʔ tkuraʔ mariʔ ɣa pklaħaŋ s~ɕa ks~ɕkaʔ βalaj ħijaʔ. rjax pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan nijaʔ ɣa jas~ɕa knakiʔ nijaʔ s~ɕa national βas~ɕketβall leaɣue nβa krajrjax. rjax ʔnwaħ nijaʔ ms~ɕpuŋ mariʔ ɣa ariŋ kawas~ɕ **** ruw muʦ~ʨiŋ kawas~ɕ ****. pllpɣun ʔnaɣal nijaʔ tins~ɕʔ kwaraʔ ɣa *.* tins~ɕʔ nijaʔ. willie a*ams~ɕ s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
